ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the pricing model */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "price_p1_var" REAL /* Variable price for period 1 */,
  "price_p2_var" REAL /* Variable price for period 2 */,
  "price_p3_var" REAL /* Variable price for period 3 */,
  "price_p1_fix" REAL /* Fixed price for period 1 */,
  "price_p2_fix" REAL /* Fixed price for period 2 */,
  "price_p3_fix" REAL /* Fixed price for period 3 */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the source of the price data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the prices */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (e.g., based on validation checks) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the price record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pricing_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the pricing model (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pricing model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the pricing model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price category */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Peak, Off-Peak) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the category (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_categories_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record being analyzed */,
  "mean_price" REAL /* Mean price of the category */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of the category */,
  "std_dev_price" REAL /* Standard deviation of the category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analytical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the analytical record */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price in the category */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_analytics_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)
